info.description: Global header configuration. Navigation is managed separately via the Navigation collection (identifier: main-nav).

transparent_on_home.description: When true, the header renders without a background on the homepage hero until the user scrolls.

cta_label.description: Optional CTA button label shown in the header nav (e.g. 'Shop Now'). Leave blank to hide.

cta_url.description: URL for the header CTA button.
